title: Workspace-scoped filesystem server is SAFE with zero findings

origin.description: Contract seed mirroring the common, correctly-scoped @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem configuration pinned to ${workspaceFolder}. Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: A filesystem server pinned to the workspace folder and a pinned package version exposes no broad access, no credentials, and no unverifiable source, so it should not alarm the user.
knownLimitations: Static analysis cannot prove the server will not request a broader path at runtime.
